membership_no.text: ทะเบียนผู้กู้

as_name.default: นางชุติมา พุ่มบุบผา

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.member_group_no, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_date , ( select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.member_group_no) as member_group_name, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name((sc_rep_kep_return_month.last_month)::int,'LT') as last_month_thai, sc_rep_kep_return_month.last_year + 543 as last_year_thai, pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name((sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month)::int,'LT') as receive_month_thai, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year + 543 as receive_year_thai, sc_rep_kep_return_month.count_month, ( select sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.unkeep_money_amount from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det where sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code ='MS00' and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.seq_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no ) as unkeep_money_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_rep_kep_return_month.book_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as book_date_tdate , '!as_name_1!' as ass_name
,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no
FROM sc_kep_t_monthly_receive , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_rep_kep_return_month, sc_mem_m_share_mem
WHERE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no AND sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.member_group_no AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no AND sc_rep_kep_return_month.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_status = '2' AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' AND sc_rep_kep_return_month.count_month = 2 AND sc_rep_kep_return_month.rep_type = 'BOK'
--เงื่อนไขเอาเฉพาะที่เรียกเก็บหนี้เท่านั้น AND EXISTS ( select sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det where sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.seq_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code in ('ML01' , 'ML02' , 'ML03') )
/*WHERE*/ order by sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no

r_ktm_mem_book_pay_return2_nest_loan.sql:
select row_number() over () + 1 as row_no , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.unkeep_money_amount , coalesce( ( select rec_det.unkeep_principal_of_loan -- เดือนก่อนหน้าใช้เงินต้น from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det rec_det where rec_det.receive_year = sc_rep_kep_return_month.last_year and rec_det.receive_month = sc_rep_kep_return_month.last_month and rec_det.seq_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.seq_no and rec_det.membership_no = sc_rep_kep_return_month.membership_no and rec_det.keeping_type_code = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code ) , 0 )as last_unkeep_money_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_calcint_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name((sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month)::int,'LT') as receive_month_thai, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year + 543 as receive_year_thai, pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name((sc_rep_kep_return_month.last_month)::int,'LT') as last_month_thai, sc_rep_kep_return_month.last_year + 543 as last_year_thai
from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_rep_kep_return_month
where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = trim( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_description ) and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_rep_kep_return_month.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year = {0} and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month = {1} and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no = {2} and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.seq_no = {3} and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code in ('ML01' , 'ML02' , 'ML03') and sc_rep_kep_return_month.count_month = 2 and sc_rep_kep_return_month.rep_type = 'BOK' and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.unkeep_money_amount > 0
